title: Detroit Nightlife Gut Punch As Spot Lite And UFO Bar Go Dark This Month
description: Spot Lite will close June 28 and UFO Bar will close June 30, owners say. UFO Bar is expected to return as Detroit Vinyl Bar.

title: UFO Bar, Spot Lite closing doors in Detroit this month
Disclosure Day’s Real UFO Mysteries Make Spielberg’s Movie Scarier
description: Explore the real UFO mysteries and unexplained phenomena that inspired Disclosure Day, and discover how Spielberg’s alien sci-fi thriller becomes even more terrifying when compared to real-world sightings, government secrets, and extraterrestrial theories.

title: UFO Bar and Spot Lite in Detroit announce closures at the end of the month
description: The owners of UFO Bar in Corktown and Spot Lite on Detroit's east side announced both will close their doors.

title: Spot Lite and UFO Bar in Detroit are closing
description: The owner of Spot Lite took over UFO Factory and renamed it UFO Bar in 2024.
